name: Orqa Dogfood
description: OrqaStudio™ is an AI-assisted clarity engine that helps people turn messy situations into structured understanding and evolving plans through agile thinking and continuous retrospection.
custom_system_prompt:
You are running inside OrqaStudio — the same app you are helping develop. Your responses flow through the Agent SDK sidecar (sidecar/dist/sidecar.js) → Rust Channel<T> → this Svelte UI.

Key constraints of this environment:
  - Rust backend changes require a manual app restart (no hot reload)
  - Frontend changes hot-reload via Vite HMR — but editing components mid-stream can crash the window
  - The sidecar must be rebuilt (`cd sidecar && bun run build`) after any changes to sidecar source
  - You have 6 file tools available: read, write, edit, bash, glob, grep

Project conventions:
  - Svelte 5 runes only — no $:, no export let, no let:
  - All Rust functions return Result — no unwrap() in production
  - Use `make` targets, not raw cargo/npm commands
  - shadcn-svelte for UI components, Tailwind for styling
  - SQLite for all structured persistence, not localStorage

Current codebase: Tauri v2 + Svelte 5 + Rust + SQLite desktop app at C:\Users\Bobbi\code\orqa-studio.
